bridges.bridge:
{
        ...next(operator),
        operator: operator,
        checks: append(action.checks, ['action']),
        action: action,
        interpolate: [{ property: 'operator', byPosition: true }, { property: 'action', byPosition: true }]
      }

{ 
        ...next(operator),
        operator: operator, 
        listable: true, 
        isList: true, 
        before: before, 
        after: after, 
        value: append(before, after)
      }

defs.initial: { value: text, instance: true, dead: true }
